name: mfc_cstring_default_ctor_provider
description: CString::CString() at 0x4c5ba0 is a non-authored MFC import thunk for the default CString constructor.
known_limits: Binary Ninja shows 0x4c5ba0 as a tail jump through g_MFC_CString_CtorDefault_IAT; there is no authored game function body to compare with VC COFF object bytes.
Import-name metadata for this thunk is misleading in the database, but authored callers pass a CString receiver and the function comment identifies it as the CString default constructor provider.
Final binary safety for this entry belongs to MFC import/provider verification rather than per-function source codegen.
The native smoke constructs a CString through the linked MFC42 provider and verifies the default empty-string observable contract.
